name: Chip
intro: Chip, the Phase Technician, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Snack Time!
abilities.description: Heal Yummy...yummy... Chips starts eating potato chips when out of combat, regenerating HP equal to 150 plus 45% after finishing a whole bag (requires 5 bites). After eating a bag of chips, Chip cannot eat again for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Crash Course
abilities.description: CC AOE Chip rams his hovercraft into the ground, dealing Magic Damage equal to 220–370 plus target's Max HP and applying Chip's Mark on enemy heroes hit. Chip gains a 300–800 (+60% Total Magic Power) shield upon hitting an enemy hero, which increases by 20% for each additional energy hero hit. Chip's next Basic Attack will become ranged and also hit all nearby enemies with Chip's Mark , detonating the mark to deal 200–350 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stun each target for 0.6 seconds.

abilities.name: Overtime
abilities.description: Speed Up Sunshine and beach, I'm here! Chip rushes forward for 2 seconds, gaining speed until he reaches 65% extra Movement Speed , after which he maintains the max speed for 2 seconds. Chip's next Basic Attack will cause him to charge at the enemy, dealing 200–300 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and knocking them back slightly.

abilities.name: Shortcut
abilities.description: Teleport CC Get it done so we can get off work. Chip drops the Main Portal on an enemy hero, dealing 200–300 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Meanwhile, he creates Connecting Portals near allied heroes (excluding allies within 8 units of Chip) and behind the allied Base. The Main Portal and Connecting Portals last up to 10 seconds. Connecting Portal : Heroes can teleport from Connecting Portals to the Main Portal , or stand on the Main Portal for a period time to return to the Connecting Portal they came from. Main Portal : Deals 600–900 (+180% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby targets after a delay and knocks them airborne for 0.8 seconds. The Main Portal inherits 80% of Chip's HP.

abilities.name: Why Walk?
abilities.description: Teleport Chip has 4 Beacons on the map. Chip eleport to any other Beacon .
